name: Inventory - Create a Transfer (Excel Upload)
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"text": "related articles and FAQs ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This article details how to create a Stock Transfer in Back Office using a purpose built Excel spreadsheet to populate your products and quantities. You can transfer stock from one Store/Outlet to a single Store, or choose to transfer stock to multiple different Stores at the same time."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type":
